creator: phil@philjordan.eu
text:
I've just encountered this issue again after it's been quiet for a long time - I'm using the device in a different location where the negotiated link speed is only 1Gbps versus the usual 2.5Gbps, so perhaps it's easier to still hit the problem at lower media speeds.

I've updated to the very latest NUC 13 platform firmware (ANRPL357.0037) but this still seems to contain the problematic I226V EEPROM version 2.17. I've submitted a support request to ASUS, here's hoping they provide an update path.
